English
Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections
New York State College of Veterinary Medicine Office of Dean George C. Poppensiek records
New York State College of Veterinary Medicine. Office of the Dean
Poppensiek, George C.
24-1-1646
12 cubic feet. 12 cubic feet.
1959-1974. Correspondence, minutes, financial and other records, date books, calendars, and other materials. Includes records of George C. Poppensiek as Dean of the New York State College of Veterinary Medicine. Collection material in English 2073546
General
Contact Information:
Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections 2B Carl A. Kroch Library Cornell University Ithaca, NY 14853 (607) 255-3530 Fax: (607) 255-9524 rareref@cornell.edu http://rmc.library.cornell.edu
EAD encoding:
Martin Heggestad, November 2003
Date modified:
RMC Staff, November 2014
COLLECTION DESCRIPTION
Includes State University of New York correspondence, minutes of administrative staff, and other materials; records of the Cornell Faculty Senate; material on physical biology, 1957-1964; records of the Veterinary College Council; material on new Veterinary College buildings; budget requests and related records; date books and calendars; records of veterinarians' conferences; Association of American Veterinary Medicine Colleges material; American Veterinary Medical Association correspondence; traditional Christmas letters from the Dean to alumni, 1959-1973; and other records of George C. Poppensiek as Dean of the New York State College of Veterinary Medicine.
Cite As:
Records of the Office of the Dean, New York State College of Veterinary Medicine, #24-1-1646. Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections, Cornell University Library.
Veterinary colleges. Veterinarians. Poppensiek, George C. New York State College of Veterinary Medicine -- : Administration. State University of New York Cornell University -- : Administration. Cornell University. Faculty Senate
